title: selaginella pubescens
intro: Selaginella pubescens is a type of ancient, evergreen plant species belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, commonly known as spikemoss or resurrection plant due to its ability to revive after drying out. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants, which help in reducing oxidative stress and promoting overall health, offering benefits like improved immune function and protection against cell damage. Selaginella pubescens is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
